name: Transaction Classification
description: Owns deterministic and assisted category suggestions, confidence, rules, and correction feedback; depends on LEDGER. Awaiting its own brainstorm.
problem_statement: Transaction descriptions vary between banks and periods, so manually assigning every transaction to a spend category will not scale and inconsistent assignments will weaken budget analysis.
why_now: Classification behavior must be isolated before statement ingestion automates high-volume transaction creation.

rationale: Classification evaluates and updates canonical ledger transactions and spend-category assignments.
